---
title: "Bacterioma y fungoma en *Phaseolus vulgaris*"
author: "Samuel Solís Barrón"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"

format:
  html:
    output-file: "index"
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 4
    toc-title: "Contenido"
    toc-location: left
    number-sections: true
    number-depth: 4
    theme: cosmo
    highlight-style: github
    code-fold: false
    code-tools: true
    code-copy: true
    code-overflow: wrap
    fig-width: 9
    fig-height: 6
    fig-align: center
    embed-resources: true
    smooth-scroll: true
    anchor-sections: true

execute:
  echo: true
  warning: false
  message: false
  cache: false

pdf_document:
  toc: true
  toc_depth: 4
  number_sections: true
---

## Introdución

## Métodos

## Resultados

## Conclusiones
